html:
Exclusive to:

“Gives the user 80 Sanity when given to a survivor's ghost.

The ghost will revive with a 25% max health penalty which can be recovered with a Booster Shot.”

-

The Telltale Heart is a craftable item in Healing Filter exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be used to revive dead players by left-clicking on the ghost of the dead player.

It can be crafted without a Science Machine using 3 Cut Grass and 1 Spider Gland. Upon crafting the Telltale Heart, the player who crafted it will lose 40 Health. If a player does not have enough health, they will not be able to craft it.

After a living player gives the heart to a ghost, the living player receives 80 Sanity, and the ghost is revived with 25% (1/4) of their maximum health removed along with normal resurrection penalties. The health penalty received by a Ghost using this item can be removed through the use of a Booster Shot. Ghost Players cannot haunt the heart to revive, they must have it given to them by a living character.

Players who have recently revived someone will be identified by a different examination quote.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Timeless Cherub's Heart skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together around Valentine's Day 2017. As of February 11, 2021, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Timeless Daggered Heart skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together around Valentine's Day 2018. As of February 11, 2021, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Timeless Staked Heart skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together around Valentine's Day 2019. As of February 11, 2021, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Timeless Stolen Heart skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together around Valentine's Day 2020. As of February 11, 2021, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Woven - Elegant Life Crystal skin was introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria. Its rarity was Inspired - Elegant initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
Timeless / Loyal
Heart Collection
Cherub's Heart
The slings and arrows of fate have taken their toll on this poor, afflicted heart.
See ingame
Timeless / Loyal
Heart Collection
Daggered Heart
Alas, some daggers through the heart are more literal than others.
See ingame
Timeless / Loyal
Heart Collection
Staked Heart
A stake in your heart that actually heals the undead.
Timeless / Loyal
Heart Collection
Stolen Heart
A heart, ripped out and offered to another.
Woven - Elegant
An Eye for an Eye Collection
Life Crystal
A shimmering, life-giving crystal.

Tips

  • It is advised to stockpile a few Telltale Hearts when the character has full or nearly full health.
    • This can be especially efficient to do before the character consumes food that restores health that otherwise would go to waste.
  • If a player died and no Spider Gland is currently available, the recently deceased are able to haunt a Spider and let the alive players kill it to get a guaranteed Spider Gland.

Trivia

  • The name of this item is a reference to Edgar Allan Poe's short story, The Tell-Tale Heart.
    • This is supported by Walter's examination quote of the Telltale heart.
    • Telltale Hearts if dropped will produce an audible heartbeat, and multiple ones will sound like rain striking a tent. This enhances the reference to Poe's story, in which the main character has auditory hallucinations that leads him to believe that the heart of the victim he murdered still beats under the floor where he hid the corpse.
  • Armor used to reduce the health cost of this item, but this was patched out.
  • It used to cost 5 Cut Grass to make a Telltale Heart.
  • Abigail cannot be revived and attempting to generates a unique character response. According to Wickerbottom's, this is because her soul is already bound to her flower.[1]
    • Telltale Hearts can also be "given" to the angry Ghosts that emerge from desecrated Graves, but aside from a comment from the current character, this also won't accomplish anything.
  • The name of the Telltale Heart is a portmonteau of the famous line to live to tell the tale, as stated by Wortox.

Abigail revive quotes

Attempting to use a Telltale Heart on Abigail will fail and cause the current character to comment about it.

Gallery

  • Telltale Heart Idle animation
  • Telltale Heart Used
  • Wilson being revived by WX-78 using a Telltale Heart.
  • Wendy holding a Telltale Heart, as seen in the Don't Starve Together launch trailer.

Sounds

References

  1. ↑ "Her spirit is already bound to something in this world." - Wickerbottom attempting to revive Abigail.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Exclusive to:
Telltale Heart
"Ghastly revival of a ghostly friend."
Object Info
Perk
Snacks blood to revive a ghost.
1 use
Does not stack
Crafting
×3 ×1 ×40
Filters
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"reviver"
“The beating of this hideous heart will bring a ghost back to life!”
–Wilson
“I expected it to be blacker.”
–Willow
“Blib blup! Blib blup! Blib blup!”
–Wolfgang
“Your choices matter.”
–Wendy
“IT UNDOES MEATLING DESTRUCTION”
–WX-78
“This provides a corporeal anchor for the ectoplasmic configuration.”
–Wickerbottom
“I need to share this with somebody!”
–Woodie
“I'm not sure I really want to give this up.”
–Maxwell
“Feel the passiön inside!”
–Wigfrid
“I think it loves me.”
–Webber
“I don't like that it's still beating.”
–Warly
“Ba-bum. Ba-bum”
–Wormwood
“I got heart to spare.”
–Winona
“So my friends might live to tell the tale!”
–Wortox
“Glurp! It still moving!”
–Wurt
“Did you ever hear the story about the beating heart hidden under the floorboards?”
–Walter
“A bit of insurance, in the unlikely event my own powers aren't enough.”
–Wanda
“Gives the user 80 Sanity when given to a survivor's ghost.
The ghost will revive with a 25% max health penalty which can be recovered with a Booster Shot.”

The name of this item is a reference to Edgar Allan Poe's short story, The Tell-Tale Heart.
This is supported by Walter's examination quote of the Telltale heart.
Telltale Hearts if dropped will produce an audible heartbeat, and multiple ones will sound like rain striking a tent. This enhances the reference to Poe's story, in which the main character has auditory hallucinations that leads him to believe that the heart of the victim he murdered still beats under the floor where he hid the corpse.

Abigail cannot be revived and attempting to generates a unique character response. According to Wickerbottom's, this is because her soul is already bound to her flower.[1]
Telltale Hearts can also be "given" to the angry Ghosts that emerge from desecrated Graves, but aside from a comment from the current character, this also won't accomplish anything.
The name of the Telltale Heart is a portmonteau of the famous line to live to tell the tale, as stated by Wortox.
Abigail revive quotes[edit | edit source]
Attempting to use a Telltale Heart on Abigail will fail and cause the current character to comment about it.
“It was worth a shot.”
–Wilson
“Ugh, just come back already! Geez!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang smush heart into ghost girl but nothing happen!”
–Wolfgang
“Why isn't it working, Abigail?”
–Wendy
“FAILURE”
–WX-78
“Her spirit is already bound to something in this world.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'd never hear the end of it from 'Luce if I didn't try.”
–Woodie
“I had to try.”
–Maxwell
“The girl's spirit cannöt be returned.”
–Wigfrid
“Wendy would've been so happy if it worked.”
–Webber
“Apologies, ma petite choux-fleur.”
–Warly
“Nope”
–Wormwood
“No one should ever lose a sister.”
–Winona
“This soul's already been sucked! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Aw... sorry Abby-gill.”
–Wurt
“If it makes you feel better, ghosts are way more interesting anyway.”
–Walter
“I was hoping this timeline might be different.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trái tim Telltale là một vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được trong Healing Filter dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được sử dụng để hồi sinh người chơi đã chết bằng cách nhấp chuột trái vào hồn ma của người chơi đã chết.
title: Telltale Heart

It can be crafted without a [[Science Machine]] using 3 [[Cut Grass]] and 1 [[Spider Gland]]. Upon crafting the Telltale Heart, the player who crafted it will lose 40 [[Health]]. If a player does not have enough health, they will not be able to craft it. After a living player gives the heart to a ghost, the living player receives 80 [[Sanity]], and the ghost is revived with 25% (1/4) of their maximum health removed along with normal [[Death#Resurrection|resurrection penalties]]. The health penalty received by a Ghost using this item can be removed through the use of a [[Booster Shot]]. Its rarity was '''Inspired - Elegant''' initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
